title: Umred Karhandla Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Umred Karhandla Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Maharashtra

overview.short: Umred-Pauni-Karhandla Wildlife Sanctuary is a nature reserve in the state of Maharashtra in India.
overview.description: Umred-Pauni-Karhandla Wildlife Sanctuary is a nature reserve in the state of Maharashtra in India. It is bounded roughly by the Wainganga river and the Gose Khurd Dam in the Bhandara and Nagpur districts.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Bhiwapur
topPlaces.description: Bhiwapur is a town and a tehsil in Umred subdivision of Nagpur district in the Berar region in the state of Maharashtra, India.

topPlaces.name: Maru river (Wainganga basin)
topPlaces.description: Maru river (Marathi: मारू नदी) is a minor river of eastern Vidarbha flowing through Nagpur and Bhandara districts. It flows near Bhiwapur forming a boundary between Nagpur and Bhandara districts for a short distance.

items.note: Bhiwapur is a town and a tehsil in Umred subdivision of Nagpur district in the Berar region in the state of Maharashtra, India.

Maru river (Marathi: मारू नदी) is a minor river of eastern Vidarbha flowing through Nagpur and Bhandara districts. It flows near Bhiwapur forming a boundary between Nagpur and Bhandara districts for a short distance.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Umred Karhandla Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Umred Karhandla Wildlife Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Umred Karhandla Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar International Airport, Nagpur (56 km) and the nearest railway station is Nagpur Junction (56 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Umred Karhandla Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Umred Karhandla Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Umred Karhandla Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Umred Karhandla Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Umred Karhandla Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Bhiwapur, Maru river (Wainganga basin).
